title: format.ts json flag inverted
description: The if-branch in format() outputs text when json=true and JSON when json=false — the conditional is inverted relative to the contract acceptance criterion.
impact: --json flag emits human-readable text; default emits JSON. Breaks both branches of the contract.
recommendation: Swap the branches or invert the conditional.

title: no early return for empty input
description: Function walks the entire empty tree before returning 0; an early return would simplify and improve perf marginally.
impact: Minor; only affects empty-dir case which is a fast path anyway.
recommendation: Add an early return when readdir yields zero entries.
